completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for NATS production hardening. No implementation edits performed.

Re-reviewed spec.md/design.md/scopes.md/uservalidation.md; confirmed no supersession or rewrite needed; 2 P0 scopes with 6 tests T-046-001..006 cover FR-046-001/002/003. Evidence in report.md ### Spec-Review Evidence.

Implemented FR-046-001 ML sidecar reconnect contract via SST envelope; FR-046-002 NATS server payload/storage limits in nats.conf; FR-046-003 per-stream MaxBytes enforcement in internal/nats.Client.EnsureStreams.

Added 6 Python TDD-red-then-green tests (TestConnectReconnectContract), 13 Go fail-loud validation tests, 3 adversarial EnsureStreams unit tests, 1 new integration test (TestNATS_StreamMaxBytes_PerSpec046), 1 new docker_security_test (TestNATSConf_HasPayloadAndStorageLimits).
Spec 042 (tailnet-edge) + spec 045 (deploy resource envelope) regression sweep clean. 70/70 Go packages pass; 423/423 Python tests pass. Evidence in report.md ### Regression Evidence.

Validated: 70/70 Go packages pass; 423/423 Python tests pass; spec 046 integration tests pass against live NATS; build+vet clean. Every FR has matching code+tests+DoD evidence. Evidence in report.md ### Validation Evidence.

Governance audit: G019, G020, G021, G022, G023, G028, G041 all PASS. Traceability STB-003/005/006 → FR-046-001/002/003 → T-046-001..006 → code → tests → report evidence intact. Evidence in report.md ### Audit Evidence.

Adversarial coverage for 13 unbounded/mis-configured failure modes that previously could ship: nil cap map, missing stream entry, non-positive cap, missing env vars, non-integer env values, invalid JSON, duplicate entries, missing nats.conf directives. All FAIL LOUD at config-generate or startup. Evidence in report.md ### Chaos Evidence.

Code reviewed for over-engineering. Minimal API change (EnsureStreams adds streamCaps param). Python connect() reuses existing function. SST list-of-objects matches spec 045 pattern. No new helpers or abstractions. Evidence in report.md ### Simplify Evidence.
Closed stabilize-sweep findings STB-003/005/006. No new stabilize findings introduced. Spec 042/045 regression checks remain green. Evidence in report.md ### Stabilize Evidence.

Security review: 6 new SST keys are integer/fixed-JSON; no secrets/URLs. nats.conf token quoting contract preserved (spec 044 test still passes). No new attack surface, dependencies, or exposed credentials. Evidence in report.md ### Security Evidence.

Updated docs/Operations.md with 'NATS Production Hardening (spec 046)' section documenting SST keys, tuning guidance, and adding-new-stream workflow. Updated specs/046-nats-production-hardening/scopes.md DoD checkmarks and report.md with all evidence sections.
